author: lhansford
description: Add a command to reset the state of any checklists in a document.

manifest.author: Luke Hansford
manifest.description: Adds a command to reset the state of any checklists in a document in Obsidian.
manifest.name: Checklist Reset

name: Checklist Reset

releases.author: lhansford
releases.description:

releases.author: lhansford
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Ensure lists in callouts can be reset by @lhansford in https://github.com/lhansford/obsidian-checklist-reset/pull/16
* Bump to 1.3.1 by @lhansford in https://github.com/lhansford/obsidian-checklist-reset/pull/17


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lhansford/obsidian-checklist-reset/compare/1.3.0...1.3.1

releases.author: lhansford
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for regex to remove text in item by @lhansford in https://github.com/lhansford/obsidian-checklist-reset/pull/13
* Update dependencies by @lhansford in https://github.com/lhansford/obsidian-checklist-reset/pull/14


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lhansford/obsidian-checklist-reset/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0

releases.author: lhansford
releases.description: - Fix an issue where the resetting a checklist and quickly switching from read mode to edit mode would revert the checklist reset.
